governance.noPollsEndedDescription: Polls will appear here after they close
governance.noDelegationsDescription: This poll has no delegated votes yet

createPollForm.title: Create Poll
createPollForm.description: Create a poll for your organization or community
createPollForm.warningHoursHint: How many hours before end to warn non-voters
createPollForm.requireWotVerifiedHint: Voters must be verified by 3+ trusted community members (Web of Trust)
createPollForm.eligibleVotersHint: Search and add people who can vote. Leave empty if everyone can vote.
createPollForm.titlePlaceholder: What should the community budget be spent on?
createPollForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Detailed description of the voting question...

delegationChains.title: Vote Delegation
delegationChains.description: See who delegated their vote to whom

auditLog.title: Vote History
auditLog.description: Every action is publicly recorded and verifiable
auditLog.merkleRootHint: A unique code that proves no votes were tampered with

delegateModal.title: Delegate Vote
delegateModal.description: You can delegate your vote to a trusted person. You can revoke the delegation at any time.

errors.noPermission: You don't have permission to vote in this poll
errors.pgpKeysRequired: PGP keys required to vote. Your profile has a PGP key registered — restore it on this device first.

governance.landing_meta: Liquid democracy voting with transitive delegation and cryptographic audit. Free and open-source.
governance.landing_hero_title: Direct and liquid democracy — free and open-source
governance.landing_hero_subtitle: Vote directly or delegate your vote to someone you trust. Transitive delegation, real-time results and cryptographic proof of every vote.
governance.landing_problem_1: Low turnout in community votes — those who can't attend lose their voice
governance.landing_problem_2: Opaque voting with no way to audit or verify results
governance.landing_problem_3: Centralized voting systems that can be manipulated
governance.landing_feature_1_desc: Vote directly or delegate your vote — transitive delegations resolve automatically in chains
governance.landing_feature_2_desc: If A delegates to B, and B delegates to C, C's vote counts for 3. Chains are visible and revocable
governance.landing_feature_3_desc: Every vote generates cryptographic proof with Merkle trees — exportable for court
governance.landing_feature_4_desc: Results update live via WebSocket as the poll progresses
governance.landing_feature_5_desc: Simple majority, 2/3 qualified or unanimity — adapts to any organization
governance.landing_feature_6_desc: Open-source, no subscription, no ads. Civic infrastructure, not a product
governance.landing_how_1: Create a poll in your organization or community
governance.landing_how_2: Members vote directly or delegate their vote to someone they trust
governance.landing_how_3: Track results in real-time and export cryptographic proof
governance.landing_free_desc: Democracy should not have a price tag. Parahub offers transparent, verifiable voting at no cost.
